summary: Make inventory ranking and hazard counts deterministic, reject mixed provider errors, pace bulk requests, and preserve watch state when completeness is unknown.
reason: Map iteration, raw substring matches, duplicate labels, partial error rows, unpaced fanout, and unproven removals could produce unstable or false recall evidence.
validated_outcome: Tests cover mixed provider errors, per-recall label deduplication, and exact-first deterministic candidate ranking; the full live CPSC matrix passes.
